validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Please enter your credentials.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Get started with 404NFID today
register.emailSent: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailSent: If that email address is registered, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox (and spam folder).

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.successMsg: Your password has been reset successfully. Redirecting you to login...
resetPassword.invalidMsg: This reset link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.tokenMissing: Reset token is missing. Please use the link from your email.
resetPassword.failed: Failed to reset password. The link may be expired.

verifyEmail.successMsg: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.tokenMissing: Verification token is missing. Please check your email link.
verifyEmail.failedMsg: Email verification failed. The link may be expired or invalid.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.useOtp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.useRecovery: Enter one of your recovery codes

dashboard.tagline: Here's what's happening in your account today.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.willAppear: Notifications will appear here when you receive them.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information
profile.clickToChange: Click on avatar to change photo
profile.displayNameHint: This name will be shown publicly
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little about yourself...
profile.dangerZoneSub: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
profile.deleteIrreversible: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage your password and two-factor authentication
security.changePasswordSub: Keep your account secure with a strong password
security.newPasswordMin: New password must be at least 8 characters
security.twoFASub: Add an extra layer of security to your account
security.twoFAActiveMsg: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
security.twoFANotEnabledMsg: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security. Even if your password is compromised, your account stays safe.
security.disableWarning: Disabling 2FA will make your account less secure. You can re-enable it at any time.
security.enterPasswordToConfirm: Please enter your password to confirm
security.enter6DigitCode: Please enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

twoFASetup.setupSubtitle: Follow the steps to enable 2FA on your account.
twoFASetup.regenSubtitle: Generate new recovery codes — your old ones will be invalidated.
twoFASetup.step1Subtitle: Use your authenticator app to scan this code
twoFASetup.cantScan: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
twoFASetup.scanInfo: Open Google Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP app and scan this QR code.
twoFASetup.step2Subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFASetup.step3Subtitle: Store these somewhere safe — you won't see them again
twoFASetup.importantCodes: If you lose your authenticator app, these codes are the only way back in.
twoFASetup.confirmSubtitle: Verify who you are before generating new codes
twoFASetup.confirmWarning: Your existing recovery codes will be permanently invalidated and replaced with new ones.
twoFASetup.newCodesSubtitle: Save these — your old codes no longer work
twoFASetup.saveNow: You won't be able to see them again.
twoFASetup.enter6DigitRegen: Please enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

users.title: User Management
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
users.deleteWarning: All user data will be permanently deleted.

createUser.title: Create user
createUser.subtitle: Add a new user to the system
createUser.tempPasswordHint: User will be prompted to change this on first login

editUser.confirmStatusMsg: Are you sure you want to set this user's status to {status}?
editUser.deleteUserSub: Permanently delete this user and all their data.
editUser.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the user and all associated data.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.subtitle: Broadcast messages to your users
announcements.info2: Users receive them in real-time via WebSocket
announcements.info3: They also appear in the notification history
announcements.info4: Target specific roles or send to everyone
announcements.confirmMsg: You are about to send an announcement to {target}.
announcements.sentMsg: Your announcement has been delivered to all targeted users.
